name: aimr
description: AIMR (AI Model Router): aim agent work at the best model you can afford. One skill that routes image gen, video previz, code recon, web research, delegated implementation, second-opinion reviews, and bulk reading to the winning CLI/model — with submodel, effort-level, and cost granularity, benchmarked rankings, and a doctor that probes which CLIs are installed, authenticated, and have quota left.
